question_en: How does the book characterize inflation in this section?
choices_en: As a redistribution of purchasing power
As proof that money is unnecessary
As a harmless short-term stimulus only
question_ko: 이 부분에서 책은 인플레이션을 어떻게 규정하는가?
explanation_en: New money is presented as shifting value away from holders of the diluting currency rather than creating real wealth.
explanation_ko: 새로운 돈은 진짜 부를 만드는 것이 아니라 희석되는 통화 보유자로부터 가치를 옮기는 것으로 제시된다.
